# TradeJS

> Open-source, self-hosted framework for building, backtesting, and running programmable trading strategies in TypeScript.

Primary site: https://tradejs.dev
Documentation: https://docs.tradejs.dev

## Product Summary

TradeJS is a TypeScript-native framework for one strategy lifecycle:

- build typed strategies and indicators with public npm packages,
- backtest and compare strategy configurations,
- promote selected results into runtime,
- generate signals and optionally automate execution,
- run the entire stack locally or on infrastructure you control.

Pine-backed strategy compatibility, AI/ML enrichment, grid search, Telegram notifications, and the optional UI extend this TypeScript-first workflow.

## Core Packages

- `@tradejs/core` - browser-safe authoring API and shared helpers
- `@tradejs/node` - Node runtime, backtests, Pine strategy loading, plugin registries
- `@tradejs/cli` - operational commands for runtime, backtests, ML, and maintenance
- `@tradejs/app` - optional installable Next.js UI

## Best Entry Points

- Getting started: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/quickstart
- Overview: https://docs.tradejs.dev/
- Core API: https://docs.tradejs.dev/api/framework
- CLI API: https://docs.tradejs.dev/api/cli
- Strategy authoring: https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/write-strategies
- TypeScript strategy tutorial: https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/typescript-strategy-step-by-step
- Indicator authoring: https://docs.tradejs.dev/indicators/authoring
- Runtime signals: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/execution/signals
- Backtesting: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/overview
- Production runbook: https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/production-runbook

## Locales

- English docs: https://docs.tradejs.dev/
- Russian docs: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ru/
